---
title: Update an individual onboarding
---

# Update an individual onboarding

Update individual onboardings using the API.

import DeprecationTimeline from '../partials/_deprecated-mutation-timeline.mdx';
import UpdateOnboardingPrereqs from '../partials/_prereqs-update.mdx';

<UpdateOnboardingPrereqs />

## Guide {#api-guide}

Update an individual onboarding by **adding an account name**.

1. First, [retrieve the ID](../overview/guide-get-info) for the onboarding you need to update.
1. Call the `updateIndividualAccountHolderOnboarding` mutation.
1. Enter the onboarding ID retrieved in step 1.
1. Add the `accountInfo.name` field with an account name (example: Personal account).
1. Add desired messages to the success payload, either for validation or in case of rejection.

:::note Deprecated mutation
The previous `updateIndividualOnboarding` mutation is deprecated.
<DeprecationTimeline />
Use `updateIndividualAccountHolderOnboarding` for all new integrations.
:::

## Mutation {#mutation}

<a href="https://explorer.swan.io?&tab=api" className="explorer-badge">Open in API Explorer</a>

```graphql {4-7,11-14} showLineNumbers
mutation UpdateIndividualOnboarding {
  updateIndividualAccountHolderOnboarding(
    input: {
      onboardingId: "$ONBOARDING_ID"
      accountInfo: {
        name: "Personal account"
      }
    }
  ) {
    ... on UpdateIndividualAccountHolderOnboardingSuccessPayload {
      __typename
      onboarding {
        accountInfo {
          name
        }
        statusInfo {
          status
        }
      }
    }
    ... on OnboardingNotFoundRejection {
      __typename
    }
    ... on OnboardingAlreadyFinalizedRejection {
      __typename
    }
  }
}
```

## Payload {#payload}

```json {6-8} showLineNumbers
{
  "data": {
    "updateIndividualAccountHolderOnboarding": {
      "__typename": "UpdateIndividualAccountHolderOnboardingSuccessPayload",
      "onboarding": {
        "accountInfo": {
          "name": "Personal account"
        },
        "statusInfo": {
          "status": "Valid"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
